user_agents.name: OAI-SearchBot
user_agents.purpose: Surface websites in ChatGPT search results
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for ChatGPT search features; uses published IP ranges
user_agents.opt_out: Disallow OAI-SearchBot in robots.txt; sites will not appear in ChatGPT search answers

user_agents.name: OAI-AdsBot
user_agents.purpose: Validate safety of web pages submitted as ads on ChatGPT
user_agents.scope: Visits only landing pages submitted as ads; data not used for training generative AI models
user_agents.opt_out: Not explicitly documented; only crawls user-submitted ad landing pages

user_agents.name: GPTBot
user_agents.purpose: Training data collection for generative AI foundation models
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for content to train generative AI; uses published IP ranges
user_agents.opt_out: Disallow GPTBot in robots.txt to indicate content should not be used for training AI models

user_agents.name: ChatGPT-User
user_agents.purpose: User-triggered fetch for live web page responses in ChatGPT and Custom GPTs
user_agents.scope: User-initiated actions in ChatGPT; not automatic crawling; does not determine search appearance
user_agents.opt_out: Not subject to robots.txt; user-initiated actions may bypass standard crawl opt-outs

user_agents.name: ClaudeBot
user_agents.purpose: Collecting web content for AI model training and development
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for gathering training data to enhance utility and safety of generative AI models
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: ClaudeBot / Disallow: / in robots.txt; respects Crawl-delay directive

user_agents.name: Claude-User
user_agents.purpose: Supports user-initiated web access when Claude AI users ask questions
user_agents.scope: User-triggered fetch for live responses to user queries in Claude conversations
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Claude-User / Disallow: / in robots.txt to prevent content retrieval for user queries

user_agents.name: Claude-SearchBot
user_agents.purpose: Web search and indexing to improve search result quality and relevance
user_agents.scope: Crawls web content to enhance relevance and accuracy of search responses for users
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Claude-SearchBot / Disallow: / in robots.txt to prevent indexing for search

user_agents.name: Googlebot
user_agents.purpose: Build Google Search indexes and other product-specific crawls
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for search results, images, videos, news, and Discover
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Googlebot / Disallow: / in robots.txt

user_agents.name: Googlebot-Image
user_agents.purpose: Crawl images for Google Images and search features
user_agents.scope: Image indexing for Google Images, Discover, Google Video, and Google Search
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Googlebot-Image / Disallow: / in robots.txt

user_agents.name: Googlebot-Video
user_agents.purpose: Crawl videos for video-related Google Search features
user_agents.scope: Video indexing for Google Search video features and video-dependent products
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Googlebot-Video / Disallow: / in robots.txt

user_agents.name: Googlebot-News
user_agents.purpose: Crawl content for Google News product indexing
user_agents.scope: News content indexing for Google News and news.google.com
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Googlebot-News / Disallow: / in robots.txt

user_agents.name: Storebot-Google
user_agents.purpose: Crawl product data for Google Shopping
user_agents.scope: Shopping product indexing across Google Shopping and Search Shopping tab
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Storebot-Google / Disallow: / in robots.txt

user_agents.name: Google-InspectionTool
user_agents.purpose: Fetch content for Search testing tools and validation
user_agents.scope: On-demand fetches for Rich Result Test and URL inspection in Search Console
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Google-InspectionTool / Disallow: / in robots.txt

user_agents.name: GoogleOther
user_agents.purpose: Generic crawling for various product teams and internal R&D
user_agents.scope: One-off crawls for internal research, development, and product-specific needs
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: GoogleOther / Disallow: / in robots.txt

user_agents.name: GoogleOther-Image
user_agents.purpose: Generic image crawling for various Google product teams
user_agents.scope: Image fetching for internal research and product development use cases
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: GoogleOther-Image / Disallow: / in robots.txt

user_agents.name: GoogleOther-Video
user_agents.purpose: Generic video crawling for various Google product teams
user_agents.scope: Video fetching for internal research and product development use cases
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: GoogleOther-Video / Disallow: / in robots.txt

user_agents.name: Google-CloudVertexBot
user_agents.purpose: Crawl content for building Vertex AI Agents requested by site owners
user_agents.scope: Site owner-requested crawls for Vertex AI Agent training and development
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Google-CloudVertexBot / Disallow: / in robots.txt

user_agents.name: Google-Extended
user_agents.purpose: Manage content use for training Gemini models and grounding
user_agents.scope: Controls whether crawled content may be used for Gemini model training and grounding
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Google-Extended / Disallow: / in robots.txt to exclude from Gemini training

user_agents.name: PerplexityBot
user_agents.purpose: Surface and link websites in search results on Perplexity
user_agents.scope: Search result crawling, not used for AI training data collection
user_agents.opt_out: Disallow PerplexityBot in robots.txt file or block IP ranges from https://www.perplexity.com/perplexitybot.json

user_agents.name: Perplexity-User
user_agents.purpose: Support user-triggered fetch requests within Perplexity for accurate answers
user_agents.scope: User-requested fetches when users ask questions; generally ignores robots.txt rules
user_agents.opt_out: Control site access via robots.txt-equivalent; block IP ranges from https://www.perplexity.com/perplexity-user.json

user_agents.name: Applebot
user_agents.purpose: Powers search, Spotlight, Siri, and Safari search results
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for search indexing and content discovery across Apple ecosystem
user_agents.opt_out: Disallow: / in robots.txt; or use robots meta tags (noindex, nosnippet, nofollow)

user_agents.name: Applebot-Extended
user_agents.purpose: Determines whether content can be used to train Apple foundation models for generative AI
user_agents.scope: Does not crawl webpages itself; processes data from Applebot crawls for AI training
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Applebot-Extended / Disallow: / in robots.txt

user_agents.name: iTMS
user_agents.purpose: Crawls URLs associated with registered content on Apple Podcasts
user_agents.scope: Apple Podcasts content only; does not follow robots.txt
user_agents.opt_out: Does not follow robots.txt directives

user_agents.name: FacebookExternalHit
user_agents.purpose: Crawl content shared on Meta's family of apps for display information
user_agents.scope: Content shared on Facebook, Instagram, Messenger; gathers title, description, thumbnail
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: facebookexternalhit / Disallow: / (may bypass robots.txt for security checks)

user_agents.name: Meta-WebIndexer
user_agents.purpose: Improve Meta AI search result quality and relevance
user_agents.scope: General web crawl to enhance Meta AI search and citation capabilities
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: meta-webindexer / Disallow: /

user_agents.name: Meta-ExternalAds
user_agents.purpose: Improve advertising and business-related products and services
user_agents.scope: Web crawl for advertising and business use cases
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: meta-externalads / Disallow: /

user_agents.name: Meta-ExternalAgent
user_agents.purpose: Training foundation AI models and improving products by indexing content
user_agents.scope: Web crawl for AI model training and product improvement
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: meta-externalagent / Disallow: / (shown in robots.txt example)

user_agents.name: Meta-ExternalFetcher
user_agents.purpose: Fetch links at user request for agentic AI and task completion
user_agents.scope: User-triggered fetch for evaluating AI capabilities and website navigation
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: meta-externalfetcher / Disallow: / (may bypass robots.txt for user requests)

user_agents.name: BingBot
user_agents.purpose: Search indexing for Bing search engine
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for search results
user_agents.opt_out: Disallow BingBot in robots.txt or use User-agent: BingBot / Disallow: /

user_agents.name: Msnbot
user_agents.purpose: Bing search index updates and web crawling
user_agents.scope: General web crawl to index content for Bing search
user_agents.opt_out: Disallow Msnbot in robots.txt or use User-agent: Msnbot / Disallow: /

user_agents.name: Baiduspider
user_agents.purpose: Baidu search engine indexing (Bing cooperative crawling)
user_agents.scope: Web crawl for Baidu search results indexing
user_agents.opt_out: Disallow Baiduspider in robots.txt via User-agent: Baiduspider

user_agents.name: Amazonbot
user_agents.purpose: Improve Amazon products and services, train Amazon AI models
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for product improvement and AI model training
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Amazonbot / Disallow: / in robots.txt

user_agents.name: Amzn-SearchBot
user_agents.purpose: Improve search experiences in Amazon products and services
user_agents.scope: Crawls content for eligibility in search experiences like Alexa and Rufus
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Amzn-SearchBot / Disallow: / in robots.txt

user_agents.name: Amzn-User
user_agents.purpose: Support user-triggered actions for live information retrieval
user_agents.scope: Fetches live information to respond to user queries like Alexa questions

user_agents.name: CCBot/2.0
user_agents.purpose: Web crawling for Common Crawl data collection
user_agents.scope: General web crawl creating Internet dataset for research and analysis
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: CCBot / Disallow: / in robots.txt file

user_agents.name: CCBot/1.0
user_agents.purpose: Web crawling for Common Crawl data collection (older version)
user_agents.scope: General web crawl creating Internet dataset for research and analysis
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: CCBot / Disallow: / in robots.txt file

user_agents.name: Agentic crawlers (general)
user_agents.purpose: AI training and content indexing for autonomous agents
user_agents.scope: General web crawl of content accessible to agentic actors
user_agents.opt_out: robots.txt disallow rules; Pay-Per-Crawl HTTP 402 Payment Required responses

user_agents.name: Verified AI training crawlers
user_agents.purpose: Training data collection for AI models
user_agents.scope: Content crawling for machine learning training datasets
user_agents.opt_out: Redirects for AI Training feature allows canonical redirection; HTTP 402 Payment Required via Pay-Per-Crawl

user_agents.name: Malicious bots
user_agents.purpose: Content scraping, login attacks, fraud
user_agents.scope: Automated attacks mimicking human behavior for malicious purposes
user_agents.opt_out: Bot management and application security controls
